title: Szoboszlai Gets 7.5, Salah With 7 | Liverpool Players Rated In Disappointing Loss Vs Wolves
fullText: Szoboszlai Gets 7.5, Salah With 7 | Liverpool Players Rated In Disappointing Loss Vs WolvesLiverpool clashed heads with Wolverhampton Wanderers at the Molineux Stadium earlier tonight as they looked to secure a good result on the road in the Premier League. The Reds made a bright start to the game but were held to a scoreless draw at the half-time break.Rodrigo Gomes scored the opener for Wolves in the 78th minute, but Mohamed Salah equalised for Arne Slot’s side just five minutes later. Andre ended up scoring the winning goal for the West Midlands club in injury time as the Merseyside club suffered a disappointing 2-1 loss at the Molineux.AdvertisementLet’s take a look at how each Liverpool player fared during the clash against Wolves.He made one important save at the back but conceded twice late in the game.RB: Jeremie Frimpong – 6/10Frimpong caught the eye at times but failed to impress in the final third.CB: Ibrahima Konate – 6.5/10He made a few crucial clearances at the back but was too slow to react to the danger in the lead-up to Wolves’ opener.CB: Virgil Van Dijk – 6.5/10Van Dijk dealt with the danger when he could, but he should have done better to prevent Gomes’ goal.WOLVERHAMPTON, ENGLAND – MARCH 03: Hugo Ekitike of Liverpool is held back after clashing with Santiago Bueno of Wolverhampton Wanderers during the Premier League match between Wolverhampton Wanderers and Liverpool at Molineux on March 03, 2026 in Wolverhampton, England. (Photo by David Rogers/Getty Images)AdvertisementLB: Milos Kerkez – 6.5/10He made some driving runs with the ball but failed to make a difference inside the opponent’s half.CM: Alexis Mac Allister – 6.5/10Mac Allister managed to shine at times but was too soft on the ball.CM: Ryan Gravenberch – 6/10He failed to get a foothold in the game and was replaced at half-time.RW: Mohamed Salah – 7/10Salah caused a few problems for his marker and managed to equalise with a good finish in the 83rd minute.CAM: Dominik Szoboszlai – 7.5/10He was a constant menace in the final third, but there was no goal for him.LW: Cody Gakpo – 6.5/10Gakpo created some headaches for his marker and was unfortunate to hit the post.AdvertisementST: Hugo Ekitike – 6.5/10He caused some problems for the Wolves centre-backs but failed to threaten their goal.Substitutes:RB: Curtis Jones – 6/10He made one key chance going forward.LW: Rio Ngumoha – 7/10Ngumoha was a constant menace in the final third.LB: Andy Robertson – 6/10He made some good runs with the ball.RB: Joe Gomez – 5.5/10Gomez’s deflection led to Wolves’ winning goal.
